title: hieracium lamprophyllum subsp. gastonianum
intro: Hieracium lamprophyllum subsp. gastonianum is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae), commonly known as a type of hawkweed. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may contribute to its use in treating various health issues. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Hieracium lamprophyllum subsp. gastonianum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
